en: What do you want from him? That, actually.
Ah, I'm afraid not. Sorry, but I wasn't asking.
You don't want to do this. Ah, you're right, I don't, but I need that stone and I don't have time to debate it.
ko: 아, 맞아요, 원하지 않지만 그 돌이 필요하고 논의할 시간이 없어요.

en: Let's start over, shall we? Please, please.
I'm sorry, I can't help you, Bruce.
If I give up the time stone to help your reality, I'm dooming my own.
ko: 타임 스톤을 포기하면 내 현실이 망가져요.

en: It's all due respect, all right? I'm not, I'm not sure the science really supports that.
ko: 모든 존경을 표하며 말씀드리는 거예요, 알겠죠?

en: The infinity stones create what you experience as the flow of time.
ko: 인피니티 스톤은 당신이 경험하는 시간의 흐름을 만들어내요.

en: Remove one of the stones and that flow splits.
ko: 스톤 하나를 제거하면 그 흐름이 갈라져요.

en: Now, this may benefit your reality, but my new one, not so much.
ko: 이건 당신의 현실에는 도움이 될 수 있지만, 내 새로운 현실에는 그렇지 않아요.

en: In this new branch reality, without our chief weapon against the forces of darkness,
ko: 이 새로운 분기 현실에서는 우리의 주요 무기가 없어요...
